Transcript:
hey everybody I want to talk about
long-term relationships when it comes to
sales I think we've all experienced that
relationship with a prospect or client
that actually turns into a friendship
and that's great not every business
relationship turns into a friendship the
good thing though is that we know that
it can happen so when we break it down
how do we do things with our prospects
and clients that continue a long-term
relationship whether it's business or
personal and it comes down to one word
trust nobody wants to have a
relationship with anybody that they
don't trust and what's the best way to
start to gain that trust it's pretty
simple you can just say to a prospect or
client whether they decide to work with
you or not to say hey thank you so much
I really appreciate the conversation I
really appreciate your business by the
way what can I do to help you and now
you've shifted it so that they know they
could call on you for anything and we've
left it purposely vague it could be
personal it could be professional but
we've started a different dialogue after
that conversation you could still send
an email later that says hey I really
enjoyed the conversation and just like I
said if there's something you need from
me please feel free to ask talk to you
soon anyway that's your tip for today on
how to build long-term successful
relationships we'll see you next time
